summary: Comprehensive end-to-end test of Gems & Luxury MVP. 34/34 backend pytest cases PASSED including JWT auth, role enforcement, attendance flow, Claude Sonnet 4.5 product generation, image upload + query-param-auth download, dashboard stats, naming/pricing/categories/settings. Frontend: admin login, all 9 admin pages, worker login + punch-in, AI-generated products visible on admin Products with pricing meta column - all working. Critical security check: pricing_meta is correctly stripped from worker /api/products responses and never leaks into worker UI.

ui_bugs.issue: Red destructive button label appears invisible/clipped (only shows red rectangle next to 'Start break'). Likely text color same as background or width too narrow.

issues: 'Sign out' label appears clipped/overlapping with the 'Punched in' toast notification

action_items: Fix worker punch-out button styling so the label text is visible
Ensure 'Punched in' success toast does not overlap header user info / Sign out button
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 926 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth, attendance, products, admin) for maintainability
auto_punch_out_sweep() function exists but is never scheduled (no APScheduler/background task wiring); auto punch-out will not happen unless a request triggers it
POST /api/admin/categories does not check for duplicate slug; could create duplicates
PATCH /api/products/{id} allows worker to edit any product if they know the id (no ownership check), unlike GET which restricts workers to own products
PATCH /api/admin/images/{id} accepts raw dict body instead of Pydantic model — weak input validation
/api/images/{id}/download decodes JWT but does not verify the user is still active or not deleted
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed (admin, worker, categories, naming families, pricing). Tests created one TEST_ user, uploaded one 1x1 PNG image, generated 2 AI products via Claude Sonnet 4.5.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all 34 critical endpoints in dependency order. Worker token state is set up by earlier tests — run full file, not individual tests. AI generate calls take ~10-15s each (Claude Sonnet 4.5 real call via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no blocking bugs. Two minor frontend visual polish issues noted above.
